name: fablever
description: A zero-dependency working-style + discipline layer for Claude Code AND Codex CLI: scope control, evidence-grounded completion, and deterministic delivery checks. Claude Code via output style + hooks + MCP; Codex CLI via AGENTS.md + hooks + MCP + on-demand Agent Skills. PLUS an experimental orchestration layer (runnable Workflow recipes for independent review, divergent exploration, decompose-and-fan-out). A style/structure transplant, not a capability transplant.
author: elon-choo (https://github.com/elon-choo)
